svg.title: Bathroom memory fragment
svg.desc: Cropped vignette: looking at a Dominican-household bathroom mirror after a hot shower. The mirror dominates, fogged with steam. The counter below holds a toothbrush cup, Crece Pelo, hair oil, Agua de Violetas, mantequilla de cacao, Vick VapoRub, a soap dispenser, and a folded towel. The reflection lags slightly. Hidden text waits behind the steam.
